name: send-message-action
description: Deliver a message to a channel (via the configured channel provider) when an agent's lifecycle event fires. Falls back to a dashboard notification when no channel is configured. Attach to an agent to activate.
author: PersonalClaw

x-meta.label: Message
x-meta.help: Message text. Supports $EVENT, $CONTEXT, and $<payload-key>. Redacted before send.

x-meta.label: Title
x-meta.help: Optional bold heading above the message.

x-meta.label: Channel ID
x-meta.help: Optional channel to post to. Empty + no user → DM the owner.

x-meta.label: User ID
x-meta.help: Optional user to DM (when no channel set).
